creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
Could you update the games/gnubg port to upstream version 1.02 ? It has been substantially improved since the 6 years old one you currently offer.

http://www.gnubg.org/index.php?itemid=22

Fix: 

I am a maintainer of this software and am available if you want to discuss things like possible configuration options.

Conversely, I would be interested in receiving build logs on platforms other than i386 and amd64 if they show warnings.
